jokes.title: Taking the scenic route
jokes.body: "I ain't lost. I'm just taking the scenic way back."

jokes.title: Creek-level forecasting
jokes.body: "Around here, if three people mention the creek before breakfast, somebody better check the gauge."

jokes.title: Cardiff traffic report
jokes.body: "Traffic was rough this morning. I had to wait on a dog, a mower, and a neighbor wanting to talk."

jokes.title: Spring timing
jokes.body: "You can tell it is really spring when everybody suddenly remembers one tool they meant to fix all winter."

riddles.question: What runs all through Cardiff but never wears a shoe?
What shows up after a rain, tells the truth, and never says a word?
What belongs to the whole town, but gets used one porch at a time?
What gets louder the stiller the woods get?
